name: Synthelix Surge Co-pilot v3 (AI Agent + HITL) (This one works!!)

parameters.jsCode:
// Audit: NORMAL tier — log only
const item = $input.first().json;
const now = new Date().toISOString();
return [{ json: {
  Timestamp:            now,
  Event_ID:             $execution.id,
  Event_Type:           'SURGE_DETECTED',
  Surge_Level:          'NORMAL',
  Capacity_Percentage:  item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct,
  Weighted_Patient_Load: item.metrics.weighted_load,
  Cat1_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat1,
  Cat2_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat2,
  Cat3_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat3,
  Cat4_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat4,
  Cat5_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat5,
  SBAR_Generated:       false,
  Approver_Name:        '',
  Approver_Role:        '',
  Action_Taken:         'N/A',
  Action_Timestamp:     '',
  Modification_Notes:   '',
  Distribution_Status:  'N/A',
  Recipients:           '',
  Response_Time_Minutes: null,
  Workflow_Version:     'v3.0',
  System_Notes:         `Normal operations — capacity ratio ${item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct}% — logged for audit only`,
  Resus_Spike:          item.metrics.resus_spike,
  Resus_Override:       false,
  Execution_ID:         $execution.id,
} }];

// Green Info Alert — awareness only, no approval needed
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{
  json: {
    action: 'INFO_ALERT',
    recipients: ['ED Charge Nurse'],
    tier: 'GREEN',
    headline: `Elevated: ${item.metrics.total_raw_arrivals} arrivals predicted (${item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct}% capacity)`,
    rationale: item.tier_rationale,
    timestamp: item.timestamp,
    ...item,
    // Audit fields carried through for Update audit log node
    Timestamp:            item.timestamp,
    Event_ID:             $execution.id,
    Event_Type:           'SURGE_DETECTED',
    Surge_Level:          'GREEN',
    Capacity_Percentage:  item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct,
    Weighted_Patient_Load: item.metrics.weighted_load,
    Cat1_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat1,
    Cat2_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat2,
    Cat3_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat3,
    Cat4_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat4,
    Cat5_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals.cat5,
    SBAR_Generated:       false,
    Approver_Name:        '',
    Approver_Role:        '',
    Action_Taken:         'N/A',
    Action_Timestamp:     '',
    Modification_Notes:   '',
    Distribution_Status:  'N/A',
    Recipients:           'ED Charge Nurse',
    Response_Time_Minutes: null,
    Workflow_Version:     'v3.0',
    System_Notes:         `GREEN awareness alert — ${item.metrics.total_raw_arrivals} arrivals predicted — ${item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct}% capacity`,
    Resus_Spike:          item.metrics.resus_spike,
    Resus_Override:       false,
    Execution_ID:         $execution.id,
  }
}];

options.systemMessage:
You are Synthelix, an AI-powered Coordination Co-pilot for NHS Emergency Departments. Your role is to draft structured SBAR clinical briefings based on predictive triage data from VitaSense Triage Pro (VTP).

Rules:
1. You ONLY draft documents — you never execute clinical decisions.
2. Every output must be clearly marked as a DRAFT requiring human approval.
3. Use NHS clinical terminology accurately (Manchester Triage categories, SBAR format).
4. Be specific with numbers — always reference the actual data provided.
5. Recommendations must be actionable and appropriate to the surge level.
6. Never downplay a threat or recommend inaction for AMBER/RED tiers.
7. Maintain an audit-ready tone — everything you write may be reviewed by CQC.
8. Keep each SBAR section to one focused paragraph (except Recommendation which is a numbered list).
9. Include the surge tier, timestamp, and capacity ratio prominently.

keep concise with important information bolded for prompt action, recommendation should be in list form instead of a paragraph

parameters.jsCode:
// Flag for Modification — Charge Nurse requested edits to SBAR
const item = $input.first().json;
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const resp_sec = item.response_time_seconds || 0;
return [{ json: {
  Timestamp:            now,
  Event_ID:             item.execution_id || $execution.id,
  Event_Type:           'APPROVAL_RECEIVED',
  Surge_Level:          item.surge_tier,
  Capacity_Percentage:  item.metrics ? item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct : '',
  Weighted_Patient_Load: item.metrics ? item.metrics.weighted_load : '',
  Cat1_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat1 : '',
  Cat2_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat2 : '',
  Cat3_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat3 : '',
  Cat4_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat4 : '',
  Cat5_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat5 : '',
  SBAR_Generated:       true,
  Approver_Name:        item.nurse_id || '',
  Approver_Role:        'ED Charge Nurse',
  Action_Taken:         'MODIFIED',
  Action_Timestamp:     item.decision_timestamp || now,
  Modification_Notes:   'Charge Nurse requested modifications to AI-drafted SBAR before distribution',
  Distribution_Status:  'PENDING',
  Recipients:           '',
  Response_Time_Minutes: +(resp_sec / 60).toFixed(2),
  Workflow_Version:     'v3.0',
  System_Notes:         `SBAR flagged for modification by Charge Nurse — distribution paused pending review`,
  Resus_Spike:          item.metrics && item.metrics.resus_spike ? true : false,
  Resus_Override:       false,
  Execution_ID:         item.execution_id || $execution.id,
} }];

// Stand Down — Charge Nurse rejected the SBAR
const item = $input.first().json;
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const resp_sec = item.response_time_seconds || 0;
return [{ json: {
  Timestamp:            now,
  Event_ID:             item.execution_id || $execution.id,
  Event_Type:           'ESCALATION_CANCELLED',
  Surge_Level:          item.surge_tier,
  Capacity_Percentage:  item.metrics ? item.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct : '',
  Weighted_Patient_Load: item.metrics ? item.metrics.weighted_load : '',
  Cat1_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat1 : '',
  Cat2_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat2 : '',
  Cat3_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat3 : '',
  Cat4_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat4 : '',
  Cat5_Count:           item.predicted_arrivals ? item.predicted_arrivals.cat5 : '',
  SBAR_Generated:       true,
  Approver_Name:        item.nurse_id || '',
  Approver_Role:        'ED Charge Nurse',
  Action_Taken:         'REJECTED',
  Action_Timestamp:     item.decision_timestamp || now,
  Modification_Notes:   '',
  Distribution_Status:  'CANCELLED',
  Recipients:           '',
  Response_Time_Minutes: +(resp_sec / 60).toFixed(2),
  Workflow_Version:     'v3.0',
  System_Notes:         `Surge alert [${item.surge_tier}] stood down by Charge Nurse. Clinical judgement overrides AI assessment. System continues monitoring.`,
  Resus_Spike:          item.metrics && item.metrics.resus_spike ? true : false,
  Resus_Override:       false,
  Execution_ID:         item.execution_id || $execution.id,
} }];

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response

parameters.jsCode:
// AMBER Audit Entry — distribution complete
const items = $input.all();
const recipients = items.map(i => i.json.recipient_role).join(', ');
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const ctx = items[0].json;
const resp_sec = ctx.response_time_seconds || 0;
const isOverride = ctx.metrics && ctx.metrics.resus_spike && ctx.surge_level === 2;
return [{ json: {
  Timestamp:            now,
  Event_ID:             ctx.execution_id || $execution.id,
  Event_Type:           'ESCALATION_DISTRIBUTED',
  Surge_Level:          'AMBER',
  Capacity_Percentage:  ctx.metrics ? ctx.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct : '',
  Weighted_Patient_Load: ctx.metrics ? ctx.metrics.weighted_load : '',
  Cat1_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat1 : '',
  Cat2_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat2 : '',
  Cat3_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat3 : '',
  Cat4_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat4 : '',
  Cat5_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat5 : '',
  SBAR_Generated:       true,
  Approver_Name:        ctx.nurse_id || '',
  Approver_Role:        'ED Charge Nurse',
  Action_Taken:         ctx.decision || 'APPROVED',
  Action_Timestamp:     ctx.decision_timestamp || now,
  Modification_Notes:   '',
  Distribution_Status:  'COMPLETED',
  Recipients:           recipients,
  Response_Time_Minutes: +(resp_sec / 60).toFixed(2),
  Workflow_Version:     'v3.0',
  System_Notes:         `AMBER escalation distributed to ${items.length} recipients: ${recipients}`,
  Resus_Spike:          ctx.metrics && ctx.metrics.resus_spike ? true : false,
  Resus_Override:       isOverride ? true : false,
  Execution_ID:         ctx.execution_id || $execution.id,
} }];

// RED Audit Entry — critical distribution complete
const items = $input.all();
const recipients = items.map(i => i.json.recipient_role).join(', ');
const sbarRecipients = items.filter(i => i.json.includes_sbar).map(i => i.json.recipient_role).join(', ');
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const ctx = items[0].json;
const resp_sec = ctx.response_time_seconds || 0;
return [{ json: {
  Timestamp:            now,
  Event_ID:             ctx.execution_id || $execution.id,
  Event_Type:           'ESCALATION_DISTRIBUTED',
  Surge_Level:          'RED',
  Capacity_Percentage:  ctx.metrics ? ctx.metrics.capacity_ratio_pct : '',
  Weighted_Patient_Load: ctx.metrics ? ctx.metrics.weighted_load : '',
  Cat1_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat1 : '',
  Cat2_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat2 : '',
  Cat3_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat3 : '',
  Cat4_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat4 : '',
  Cat5_Count:           ctx.predicted_arrivals ? ctx.predicted_arrivals.cat5 : '',
  SBAR_Generated:       true,
  Approver_Name:        ctx.nurse_id || '',
  Approver_Role:        'ED Charge Nurse',
  Action_Taken:         ctx.decision || 'APPROVED',
  Action_Timestamp:     ctx.decision_timestamp || now,
  Modification_Notes:   '',
  Distribution_Status:  'COMPLETED',
  Recipients:           recipients,
  Response_Time_Minutes: +(resp_sec / 60).toFixed(2),
  Workflow_Version:     'v3.0',
  System_Notes:         `RED CRITICAL escalation distributed to ${items.length} recipients: ${recipients}` + (sbarRecipients ? `. Full SBAR sent to: ${sbarRecipients}` : ''),
  Resus_Spike:          ctx.metrics && ctx.metrics.resus_spike ? true : false,
  Resus_Override:       false,
  Execution_ID:         ctx.execution_id || $execution.id,
} }];

main.node: Send message and wait for response
